records.feeSummary: £7 each time a vehicle enters a terminal drop-off zone
records.penaltyNotes: £80 Parking Charge Notice for non-payment, reduced to £40 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit (can also pay in advance or on the day)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can apply for a 100% discount using the vehicle registration number, up to 3 months in advance, during the trip, or by midnight the day after

freeAlternative.name: Park & Ride (formerly Long Stay)
freeAlternative.details: Up to 30 minutes free in Park & Ride car parks, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal doors every 15 minutes

records.feeSummary: £10 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per additional minute (max charge £30, max stay 30 minutes)
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge Notice for non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders dropped off by friends or taxi are exempt from the charge if they register the vehicle number plate in advance (free 30-minute session)

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to two hours, with a free shuttle bus to the terminals

records.feeSummary: £5 for up to 5 minutes, £6.40 up to 10 minutes, £25 up to 30 minutes
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge for overstaying the 30-minute maximum or non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days (plus debt-recovery fee of up to £70)
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after you use the Drop Off Zone
records.blueBadgePolicy: The Drop Off Zone is free of charge where the passenger being dropped off holds a valid Blue Badge; the passenger must show the badge to a traffic marshal on entry (driver's badge does not qualify)

freeAlternative.name: JetParks 1 free drop-off
freeAlternative.details: Free drop-off area a little further from the terminals, with a free shuttle bus running 24/7 (journey takes a few minutes)

records.feeSummary: £10 for up to 15 minutes (Express Set Down)
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge Notice for non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days
records.blueBadgePolicy: Normal charges apply, but where the passenger holds a valid Blue Badge the driver is eligible for an extension to the 30-minute maximum stay if reasonably required

freeAlternative.name: Mid Stay car park free drop-off
freeAlternative.details: Free drop-off area at the Mid Stay car park with a free shuttle bus to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £7 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per minute (max stay 30 minutes)
records.penaltyNotes: £95 enforcement charge for staying past 30 minutes, reduced to £55 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit
records.blueBadgePolicy: No concessions are available for Blue Badge holders in the main Express Drop Off area

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to two hours, with a free shuttle bus (around 10 minutes, every 20 minutes) to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £8.50 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per minute
records.blueBadgePolicy: Vehicles carrying passengers with Blue Badges have free access to the car parks for one hour

records.feeSummary: Free for the first 10 minutes in the Drop Off car park; standard tariff applies thereafter
records.penaltyNotes: No return within one hour: returning before the hour is up forfeits the 10 minutes free
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use Premium Set Down free for the first 30 minutes, validated at the NCP Customer Service cabin with the Blue Badge and vehicle registration

freeAlternative.name: Drop Off car park (first 10 minutes free)
freeAlternative.details: The standard Drop Off car park is free for the first 10 minutes, a short walk from the terminal

records.penaltyNotes: A premium charge is payable on exit for staying in the Express Drop-off longer than 15 minutes (amount not published on the official page)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders should not use the Express Drop-off; they should use Car Park 2 opposite the terminal for up to 30 minutes free parking (not for commercial, hire or reward)

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £8.50 for up to 10 minutes (Drop Off & Pick Up car park)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can stay up to 40 minutes for the £8.50 fee by scanning the barcode on the reverse of the Blue Badge at the exit barrier

freeAlternative.name: Waiting Zone
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour while waiting, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal every 15 minutes from the adjacent car rental facility

records.feeSummary: £5 for up to 10 minutes (Drop Off Zone)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use the Short Stay Car Park free of charge for 30 minutes by validating the ticket with a car park team member; after 30 minutes a minimum £5 fee applies

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: 15 minutes free in the Long Stay car park for dropping off or collecting passengers; normal gate rates apply thereafter
